patches.hypothesis: The null check was missing in the `_deserializeCustom` method, which caused a `NullPointerException` when deserializing an array of strings with a null value. The issue was also present in the `deserialize` method, but was not exposed in the failing test.
patches.changes: + if (t == JsonToken.VALUE_NULL) { value = null; } else { value = deser.deserialize(jp, ctxt); }
